meaning: adj.[鍦癩鍐版渤鏈熶互鍚庣殑
examples: We do not know whether we live in a postglacial period or an interglacial period.
Element geochemical study shows that the Changjiang and the Huanghe Rivers have a great influence on development of north Jiangsu Coastal Plain in postglacial period.
These inclined beddings can be divided into 4 bedding assemblages to represent different development stages of tidal sand ridges and to correspond to different postglacial sea-level rise periods.
